description: Tier B (real-world): based on GitHub 2022 Actions runner incident — parallel test matrix jobs exhausting runner memory, causing cascading job failures
source: Based on GitHub Incident Report 2022 — Actions runner memory exhaustion pattern

logs.message: Out of memory: Kill process 1103 (runner) score 812 or sacrifice child
##[error] The runner has received a shutdown signal. This can happen when the runner service is stopped, or a manually started runner is canceled.
##[warning] You are running out of disk space. The runner will stop working when the machine runs out of disk space.
##[error] Lost communication with the server. Retrying in 30 seconds (1/10)

oom_events: kernel: oom_kill_process: Killed process 1103 (runner) — 3 parallel matrix jobs sharing 7GB RAM

alert.detail: CI runner OOM — 3 parallel jobs killed, pipeline failing

expected_root_cause: parallel CI jobs exhausting runner memory
